chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI Constitution Petition No. S – 405 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGES Fresh Case 1. For orders on CMA No.3795/2025 (U/A). 2. For orders on CMA No.3796/2025 (Stay). 3. For orders on office objections 1 to 3 & 8 a/w reply as at ‘A’. 4. For orders on CMA No.3414/2025 (Exemption). 5. For hearing of main case. 22.05.2025 Mr. Makhdoom Javaid Hussain, Advocate for the Petitioner..-.-.-.-.-. 1. Urgency granted. 2–5. Through the instant Petition learned counsel for the Petitioner has impugned order dated 18.04.2025, whereby the application for recalling of order dated 01.03.2025 was dismissed. I have examined the order dated 01.03.2025 and it is evident that the side of the Petitioner was closed due to his repeated non-appearance. It is evident from the impugned order that the Petitioner remained absent during the evidence of the Respondent. The conduct of the Petitioner only reflects that he is trying to delay the matter and, on that account, the instant petition warrants no consideration. The petition along with the pending applications is dismissed in limine with cost. JUDGE Nadeem Qureshi “PA”
